name: agent402-ai-sdk
description: Vercel AI SDK tools for Agent402: turn 1,293 pay-per-call x402 tools (browser, web search, OCR, PDFs, memory) into AI SDK tools via four meta-tools (find/route/call/about), plus the cross-seller x402 Smart Order Router. Free via proof-of-work or pay per call in USDC on Base.
author: Mikey Petrillo <mike@agent402.tools> (https://github.com/MikeyPetrillo)
